title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nalco - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nalco - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nalco is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Nalco:
Nalco is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nalco!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
